description: Automated validation hooks for versioning rule enforcement

format_validator.description: Validates release version matches v1.2.3.4 format

segment_increment_validator.description: Validates segment increment follows versioning rules
segment_increment_validator.automation: CI/CD pipeline validation before tag creation
checks: model change: segment 1 incremented, segments 2-4 are zero
service change: segment 2 incremented, segments 3-4 are zero
bug fix: segment 3 incremented, segment 4 is zero
build only: only segment 4 incremented
multiple changes: highest-order wins

V0_convention_validator.description: Validates V0 files exist without version folder
checks: Models/Foundations/{Entity}/{Entity}.cs exists for V0
Services/Foundations/{Entity}/{Entity}Service.cs exists for V0

versioned_file_location_validator.description: Validates versioned files are in correct location
checks: versioned model: Models/.../V{n}/{Entity}V{n}.cs
model-driven versioned service: Services/.../V{n}/{Entity}V{n}Service.cs
behavior-only versioned service: Services/.../{Entity}ServiceV{n}.cs (no version folder)
model+behavior versioned service: Services/.../V{m}/{Entity}V{m}ServiceV{n}.cs
versioned exceptions: Models/.../V{n}/Exceptions/

file_naming_validator.description: Validates versioned file naming convention for all scenarios
checks: model files match pattern: {Entity}V{n}.cs
service with model version only matches pattern: {Entity}V{n}Service.cs
service with behavior version only matches pattern: {Entity}ServiceV{n}.cs (no version folder)
service with model and behavior versions matches pattern: {Entity}V{m}ServiceV{n}.cs
behavior version always appears as suffix after service name
when model and behavior change together, behavior version is absent from file name (V0 implied)

additive_versioning_validator.description: Validates earlier versions still exist (no destructive changes)
checks: V0 files still exist when V1 added
V1 files still exist when V2 added
no deletions unless explicit deprecation

V0_route_validator.description: Validates V0 routes follow api/{Resource} pattern

model_version_route_validator.description: Validates model version routes follow api/V{n}/{Resource} pattern

behavior_version_route_validator.description: Validates behavior version routes follow api/V{n}.{m}/{Resource} pattern

route_alignment_validator.description: Validates API route aligns with underlying model/service version
checks: api/V1/Students maps to StudentV1 model and StudentV1Service
api/V1.1/Students maps to StudentV1 model with behavior version 1
route version segments match file version segments

deprecation_metadata_validator.description: Validates deprecated APIs have required metadata
checks: DeprecatedApi attribute present
Sunset date specified
Warning message specified
Link to migration guidance specified
Obsolete attribute present on deprecated classes
Obsolete message explains deprecation reason

sunset_notice_validator.description: Validates consumers have adequate notice before sunset
checks: sunset date is at least 90 days from deprecation announcement
deprecation notice has been published

version_segment_integrity_validator.description: Validates version segments represent correct change types
checks: model changes do not hide in service segment
service changes do not hide in bug/config segment
build increment only used for build changes
all version folders are documented
all API versions are documented
capabilities endpoint lists all supported versions

violation_severity_levels.warning: requires review but does not block
